content: isipinsubnet  Table of contents Prototype: isipinsubnet(range, ip_address1, ip_address2, ...) Return type: boolean Description: Returns whether the given range contains any of the following IP addresses. Arguments: range : string - IP address range syntax - in the range: .* Example: Run: code bundle agent main { classes : "in_192" expression => isipinsubnet ( "192.0.0.0/8" , "192.1.2.3" ); "in_192_2_2_2" expression => isipinsubnet ( "192.2.2.0/24" , "192.1.2.3" ); reports : in_192 :: "The address 192.1.2.3 is in the 192/8 subnet" ; !in_192_2_2_2 :: "The address 192.1.2.3 is not in the 192.2.2/24 subnet" ; } Output: code R: The address 192.1.2.3 is in the 192/8 subnet R: The address 192.1.2.3 is not in the 192.2.2/24 subnet See also: iprange() , host2ip() , ip2host() History: Was introduced in CFEngine 3.10.
